ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament (e.g., international, national, league) */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the tournament */,
  "prize_money" TEXT /* Prize money for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country represented by the team */,
  "code" TEXT /* Unique code for the team (e.g., FRA, SLO, USA) */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "assistant_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team assistant coach */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the match belongs to */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team in the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team in the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the match (e.g., 3-0, 2-3) */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., group stage, quarterfinals, finals) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team in the match */,
  "sets_won" INTEGER /* Number of sets won by the team in the match */,
  "attacks" INTEGER /* Number of attacks made by the team in the match */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks made by the team in the match */,
  "serves" INTEGER /* Number of serves made by the team in the match */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions made by the team in the match */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors committed by the team in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team standing */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the standing belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the standing belongs to */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the team in the tournament */,
  "matches_won" INTEGER /* Total number of matches won by the team in the tournament */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total number of points scored by the team in the tournament */,
  "sets_won" INTEGER /* Total number of sets won by the team in the tournament */,
  "points_avg" REAL /* Average points scored by the team in the tournament */,
  "set_avg" REAL /* Average sets won by the team in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Outside Hitter, Middle Blocker) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player (in cm) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in kg) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in the match */,
  "attacks" INTEGER /* Number of attacks made by the player in the match */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks made by the player in the match */,
  "serves" INTEGER /* Number of serves made by the player in the match */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions made by the player in the match */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors committed by the player in the match */,
  "aces" INTEGER /* Number of aces scored by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, coach, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., muscle strain, ligament sprain) */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Expected recovery time (in days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team staff member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the staff member belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the team staff member (e.g., head coach, assistant coach, trainer) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the team staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_staff_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the sponsor is sponsoring */,
  "sponsorship_amount" TEXT /* Amount of sponsorship provided by the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)
